case_title: NOORI, HASHMATULLAH DBA EASY RENT A CAR VS GAMIT, PABLITO JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOORI, HASHMATULLAH DBA EASY RENT A CAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO JR. $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $67.00, DMV RECORDS INDICATE THAT THIS VEHICLE WAS CLASSIFIED AS "SALVAGED" ON 11/16/04. PER KELLY BLUE BOOK, "A VEHICLE WITH A BRANDED TITLE (SLAVAGE, FLOOD, ETC) OR UNSUBSTANTIATED MILEAGE IS CONSIDERED "POOR". A VEHICLE IN POOR CONDITION MAY REQUIRE AN INDEPENDENT APPRAISAL TO DETERMINE ITS VALUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,487.47 FILED BY NOORI, HASHMATULLAH DBA EASY RENT A CAR AS TO DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GAMIT, PABLITO JR.
